# Staton s.r.o. - Industrial PVD Coating & Engineering Solutions

Staton s.r.o. is a global leader in PVD (Physical Vapor Deposition) coating technology and machine manufacturing. We specialize in fsARC™ filtered cathodic arc systems that deliver flawless, droplet-free performance for precision industrial engineering.

## Key Information

- **Website**: https://www.statonindia.com/
- **Core Technology**: fsARC™ Filtered Cathodic Arc, Magnetron Sputtering, PVD Coating.
- **Primary Products**: OCTOARC (Multi-arc systems), OCTOMAG (Magnetron sputtering systems).
- **Industries Served**: Automotive, Cutting Tools, Medical Devices, Aerospace.

## Main Sections

- [About Staton](https://www.statonindia.com/about.html): Company history, European engineering heritage, and mission.
- [Technology](https://www.statonindia.com/technology.html): Detailed overview of fsARC™ technology and its advantages over conventional coating.
- [Products](https://www.statonindia.com/products.html): Specifications for OCTOARC and OCTOMAG machine series.
- [Applications](https://www.statonindia.com/applications.html): Case studies and solutions for various industrial sectors.
- [Services](https://www.statonindia.com/services.html): Overview of coating services, machine maintenance, and local support.
- [Testimonials](https://www.statonindia.com/testimonials.html): Success stories from global industrial leaders.
- [Contact](https://www.statonindia.com/contact.html): Inquiry forms and contact details for global and regional offices.

## Technical Capabilities

- **Surface Excellence**: fsARC™ technology eliminates macro-particles/droplets.
- **Tool Life Enhancement**: Up to 5× increase in durability for cutting tools.
- **Thermal Stability**: Coatings engineered for environments > 1000°C.
- **Local Support**: 24/7 remote diagnostics and on-site engineering support in India.
